name: DNSimple API
description: [DNSimple](https://dnsimple.com) provides DNS hosting and domain registration that is simple and friendly. We provide an extensive API and an easy-to-use web interface so you can get your domain registered and set up with a minimal amount of effort.

capabilities.name: accounts
capabilities.description: Manage accounts — list accounts. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: identity
capabilities.description: Manage identity — exchange authorization code for access token, whoami. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: billing
capabilities.description: Manage billing — list billing charges, analytics about dns queries. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domains
capabilities.description: Manage domains — create a domain, list domains, domains research status. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domain_dnssec
capabilities.description: Manage domain dnssec — enable dnssec, create a delegation signer record, dnssec status. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domain_emailforwards
capabilities.description: Manage domain emailforwards — create an email forward, list email forwards, retrieve an email forward. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domain_pushes
capabilities.description: Manage domain pushes — initiate a push, accept a push, list pushes. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: domain_certificates
capabilities.description: Manage domain certificates — let's encrypt: order a certificate, let's encrypt: issue a certificate, let's encrypt: order a certificate renewal. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: tlds
capabilities.description: Manage tlds — list tlds, retrieve the tld, list tld extended attributes. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: registrar
capabilities.description: Manage registrar — register a domain, transfer a domain, authorize a domain transfer out. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: registrar_transfer
capabilities.description: Manage registrar transfer — enable domain transfer lock, domain transfer lock status, retrieve a domain transfer. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: registrar_renewal
capabilities.description: Manage registrar renewal — renew a domain, enable domain auto-renewal, retrieve a domain renewal. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
